data.name: Exceptions.InvalidOperation.EmptySpan
data.value: Span must not be empty for this operation to be performed successfully.

data.name: Exceptions.InvalidOperation.EmptyMemory
data.value: Memory must not be empty for this operation to be performed successfully.

data.name: Exceptions.Argument.WhiteSpace.Memory
data.value: Memory must not contain chars or strings with whitespace.

data.name: Exceptions.Argument.WhiteSpace.Span
data.value: Span must not contain chars or strings with whitespace.

data.name: Exceptions.Spans.Sorts.LengthMismatch
data.value: The length of the keys span and values span do not match.

data.name: Exceptions.Spans.Copy.DestinationShorterThanSource
data.value: Destination span length is shorter than the source span.

data.name: Exceptions.Spans.Copy.DestinationSmallerThanIndex
data.value: Destination span length is smaller than start index + length.
